arguments.argument:
/* ***** Requires ***** ** bulletSpeed: initial speed when launched (and used for current speed during seeking behavior) ** minSpd: minimum speed when turning ** maxSpd: maximum speed when seeking ** turnSpd: degrees to rotate each frame ** accel: acceleration and deceleration when turning/seeking ** seekThres: angle difference from self to target before acceleration kicks in ** targetTime: time till seeking behavior starts */ event_inherited() setCollisionBounds(-2,-2,2,2)
//Enemy base statistics bShowHealthBar=false bShowDamage=false bCanTakeDamage=false damageType="EXPLOSION" hitWall=0 atkProg=0 diff=100 decay=210
